namename i am writing this letter with deep frustration and disappointment to formally raise a complaint against the at your name his continued unwillingness to assist me in restructuring my loan despite my repeated written requests and followups i have been a customer of since and for nearly two decades i have always trusted this institution as my financial partner i currently have a facility of the above account number due to financial challenges beyond my control i reached out times a humane restructuring plan not to avoid repayment but to remain a responsible customer my letters and requests have been met with silence has neither responded nor shown any willingness to listen or guide me through this difficult time indifference has caused me immense distress as i feel abandoned by the very bank i have stood by faithfully for so many years i am a man of years struggling to regain my financial footing stress and pressure from this situation have pushed me close to yet all i have been seeking is understanding and support from a bank i have always trusted i truly believe that no loyal customer deserves to be ignored in this way especially after years of commitment and trust i therefore appeal your esteemed office for intervention i kindly request that my loan restructuring matter be handled by a compassionate officer at the or any other responsive manager who can help me find a workable solution treat this matter as i am emotionally and financially exhausted but i still have faith that a brand built on customer care and empowerment will not allow one officers negligence to destroy the trust i have had for so long i will deeply appreciate your immediate response and guidance on the way forward find attached letters which i wrote to the branch that were never responded to you for your time understanding and compassion sincerely vincent kamau mukami id idnumber accountnumber plum properties ltd contacts phone email juja town juja arcade suit f
